_meta.description: Intake registry for all source documents, files, and external references. Every extracted fact must trace to a src_ record.

records.title: SYSTEM.md — Constitutional Layer
records.notes: Highest-ranking instruction layer. Governs mission, ethics, legal, and privacy. All other documents subordinate.

records.title: CLAUDE.md — Engineering Operator Layer
records.notes: Engineering rules. Governs how to build. Subordinate to SYSTEM.md.

records.title: MA-PMP-001 v21 — Project Management Plan
records.notes: Current canonical PMP. v21 incorporates MA-CTX-001, MA-SOC-002, MA-AGT-001 and Projections v15.

records.title: MA-CTX-001 — Context Registry Specification
records.notes: This registry was scaffolded from this specification.

records.title: MA-SOC-002 — Patient Story Engine
records.notes: Governs story sourcing, consent, PII scrub, and AI avatar pipeline. Gate 0 eligible as of Phase 1 ship.

records.title: MA-AGT-001 — External Agent Integration Plan
records.notes: Defines 11 agents (GEO-01/02/03, DEV-01/02/03, CNT-01, MKT-01/02/03, PRD-01). Phase 1 agents active; signal-gated agents deferred.

records.title: MA-COST-001 — API Cost Architecture
records.notes: $150/month cap. Haiku default. Sonnet reserved for document upload. 3-bucket classification required before any new AI call site.

records.title: MA-SEC-002 — Security Checklist (24 controls)
records.notes: 24 controls, 20 original + 4 AI content security. All must PASS before any feature touching user data.

records.title: CMS CARC Codes — Claim Adjustment Reason Codes (Official)
records.notes: Primary authority for CO, PR, OA, N series denial codes. Referenced in supabase/seed/denial_codes.sql (52 codes).

records.title: Supabase seed/denial_codes.sql — 52 enriched codes
records.notes: 52 enriched denial codes with plain_language_explanation, recommended_action, appeal_angle. Source for denial_codes.json extraction.

records.title: MA-SUP-DAT-001 — Proprietary Data Engine Strategy v1.0
records.notes: Formalizes the Proprietary Data Engine as a long-term strategic pillar. Defines friction_events table schema (two datasets: insurance friction + appeal outcomes), four-layer privacy architecture compliance, publication thresholds (Phase 3+), competitive moat analysis, and 26-task sprint plan (MA-DAT-ENG-P1 through P4). Phase 1 obligation: migration 019 (friction_events stub) must be deployed before launch. Attorney HIPAA-adjacent review required before Phase 3 publication. Nurse co-founder sign-off required on claim_amount_range prompt language.

records.title: MA-SEO-SUP-001 — SEO Authority & Content Infrastructure Strategy v1.0
records.notes: Formalizes 9 SEO operating decisions: (1) cornerstone library 10-guide sequence with Phase gates, (2) anonymous trust infrastructure 9 required pages, (3) editorial board attribution model, (4) backlink program Phase 3 activation, (5) policy interpretation cluster Phase 4, (6) content refresh tier thresholds and refresh_priority_score system, (7) Annual Outcomes Report Phase 5 data gate, (8) Spanish-language content Phase 4 pilot, (9) GEO template as Phase 1 standard. Section 10 revises agent deployment: Content Refresh Agent → Phase 2, Data/Insights Agent → Phase 3, CMO Outreach Module → Phase 3. Section 11 introduces 18 new dashboard metrics. Section 12 = master roadmap table. Document ID: MA-SEO-SUP-001. Authority: MA-SEO Family, Supporting Anchor.

records.title: MyAdvocate SEO Gap Analysis v1 — Applying National Denial Data to Targeting, Content, and Brand Positioning
records.notes: Primary source for three-tier SEO cluster architecture (pillar/hub/code), 12-code priority publishing sequence, brand anchor stat (<1% appeal / 40-60% win rate from KFF/OIG data), denial category volume splits, and referral alignment by denial type. Grounds all cluster_0006-0009 and page_0006-0021 entries. YMYL NOTE: stat citations require date reference on publish. Clinical-adjacent stat usage to be confirmed by LPN/LVN reviewer before any content goes live.

records.title: MyAdvocate Agent Hierarchy & Subagent Implementation Report
records.notes: Translates PMP operating model into repo-native .claude/agents hierarchy. 5 directors, 25+ specialists, 8 runtime-mirror specs. Replaces flat agent deployment model from MA-AGT-001. Preserves PMP phase gates and signal-gated discipline.

records.title: MyAdvocate Agent System Pack (ZIP)
records.notes: Contains 29 agent .md files across 5 folders (orchestration, implementation, content-ymyl, growth, runtime-mirrors) + README. Installed to .claude/agents/.

records.title: MyAdvocate Agent Runtime Starter Pack (ZIP)
records.notes: Contains config layer (agent_hierarchy.yaml, reporting_matrix.yaml, handoff-rules.yaml, event-taxonomy.yaml), 7 dashboard panel definitions, 6 report schemas, registry schema + example, templates. Installed to config/agent_runtime/.

records.title: OpenHands Integration Report for MyAdvocate
records.notes: Proposes OpenHands as supervised coding agent for bounded implementation tasks. 90-day rollout. Governance: branch policy, label convention, max scope per task, founder review on all PRs. Complements agent hierarchy (hierarchy = organizational structure, OpenHands = execution capacity).

records.title: MyAdvocate OpenHands Playbook V2
records.notes: Operational playbook with 10 ready-to-go task specs, trigger policy, governance rules, and 3-stage rollout (manual → issue-driven → n8n-triggered). Several task specs are stale (already completed in Phase 1/2 Sprint 1). Active tasks: content validation script, pre-launch engineering check, server/client boundary audit.
